hooks.command: export PATH="$PATH:$HOME/.local/bin:/opt/homebrew/bin:/usr/local/bin"; if command -v uv >/dev/null 2>&1; then exec uv run --quiet --script "${CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT}"/hooks/langfuse_hook.py; else exec python3 "${CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT}"/hooks/langfuse_hook.py; fi

export PATH="$PATH:$HOME/.local/bin:/opt/homebrew/bin:/usr/local/bin"; if command -v uv >/dev/null 2>&1; then exec uv run --quiet --script "${CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT}"/hooks/langfuse_hook.py; else exec python3 "${CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT}"/hooks/langfuse_hook.py; fi
